title: Backend: Collection CRUD Endpoints
description: Implement REST API endpoints for collections: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /admin/collections. Collection includes ID, permissions, and membership. Backend validates collection-level permissions for all operations.

statusHistory.comment: Plan approved: split monolithic AdminService into domain-specific services starting with CollectionService. Create dedicated collection.controller.ts, collection.service.ts, and collection.repository.ts. Add organisation_id to AuthUser type. Implement collection-level permission validation. See full plan in conversation.
